free_text: Fast neutron scattering near shell closures: scandium
Elemental scandium, >99% pure.
Liquid scintillators
relative efficiencies of detectors determined using
252Cf fission spectrum.
Corrected for multiple events, beam attenuation, and
angular-resolution effects.
Inelastic scattering to 12.4 keV level not resolved
from elastic scattering measurements..
Includes both systematic and statistical
uncertainties associated with both the sample and
the normalization.
